headline: Big Banks Can Weather Severe Recession, Fed Says, in Unusual Year for Stress Tests
summary: The Federal Reserve said the nation’s largest banks could absorb $708 billion in losses and keep lending, though this year’s stress-test results won’t affect capital requirements.

raw.headline: Big Banks Can Weather Severe Recession, Fed Says, in Unusual Year for Stress Tests
raw.summary: The Federal Reserve said the nation’s largest banks could absorb $708 billion in losses and keep lending, though this year’s stress-test results won’t affect capital requirements.

headline: KeyBank Celebrates Grand Opening of New, Full-Service, State-of-the-Art Branch in Vestal With $15,000 in Donations to Local Non-Profits
summary: New branch is designed to give clients a more personal and accessible banking experience NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / June 24, 2026 /KeyBank held a grand opening and ribbon cutting ceremony for its new, full-service, state-of-the-art branch ...

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on KeyCorp, Raises Price Target to $24
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Brian Foran   maintains KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) with a Hold and raises the price target from $23 to $24.
